title: Release Readiness
summary: Check whether a project is ready to publish, tag, or ship.
task_template: Assess release readiness for: {task}. Inspect source, docs, tests, packaging, generated artifacts, and user-facing workflows in scope: {scope}.
context: Expected outcome: release blockers, warnings, verification commands, documentation gaps, and a concrete go/no-go recommendation.
outcome: A release gate report with blockers, warnings, and verification evidence.
next_steps: Complete the release, docs, QA, and reviewer packets.
Fix blockers before tagging or publishing.
